calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
Defendant Nelia Balisi, a/k/a Nelia N. Balisi, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on Apirl 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 26, 2010.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. MacDonald. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, judgment shall issue against defendant Nelia Balisi, a/k/a Nelia N. Balisi, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $14,875.78.
Interest - $1,254.41.
Costs - $399.50.
Total - $16,529.69.

Plaintiff will file an abstract of judgment, but will not execute on the judgment provided defendant adheres to the following payment plan:

Commencing September 1, 2010, and continuing on the first of each month thereafter, defendant shall pay plaintiff $150.00 per month for eighteen months. Thereafter, defendant shall pay plaintiff $250.00 per month until the balance is paid in full. There shall be a ten (10) day grace period should defendant to fail to make any payment on the first of the month.
Defendant was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and her understanding of the agreement. Payment plan shall be reduced to writing by counsel for plaintiff.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Set For Trial On Jul-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
